title: Capital Flow Stability
description: Capital Flow Stability measures how efficiently the system handles downside pressure and restores new equity highs.
interpretation:
Capital Flow Stability measures how efficiently the system handles downside pressure and restores new equity highs.

25 of 30 completed downside pressure cycles were below 3%. Medium pressure averaged 1.37% in depth and restored in 2.25 business days, while major pressure averaged 9.23% in depth and restored in 20.8 business days. Larger market-regime pressure was fully handled, though it required longer capital rotation.
